name: Wat Phra Kaew (玉佛寺) & Grand Palace
location: Phra Borom Maha Ratchawang, Phra Nakhon
notes: 曼谷最神圣的寺庙，玉佛由整块翡翠雕刻而成。与大皇宫相连，门票500泰铢。建议早上去避免旅行团高峰。

name: Wat Arun (郑王庙)
notes: 湄南河畔的黎明寺，标志性高棉风格佛塔。傍晚时分光线最美，可以从对岸坐渡轮过去，仅需4泰铢。

name: King Power Mahanakhon Skywalk
notes: 314米高空玻璃栈道，曼谷最高观景台。日落时段去可以同时看到白天和夜景，门票约880泰铢。

name: Jim Thompson House Museum
notes: 美国丝绸商人Jim Thompson的泰式柚木宅邸，现在为博物馆。庭院很美，导览讲解很有趣，门票200泰铢。

name.local: พิพิธภัณฑสถานแห่งชาติ พระนคร

location.address: 4 Na Phra That Road, Phra Borom Maha Ratchawang, Phra Nakhon, Bangkok 10200, Thailand

experience.summary: 曼谷国立博物馆，泰国最大艺术与文物收藏
highlights: Largest collection of Thai art and artifacts

practical.transport: MRT: Sanam Chai Station (approx. 15-20 min walk); Boat: Phra Arthit Pier or Tha Chang Pier; Taxi: Best way to reach the entrance directly

recommendation.bestTime: Wednesday or Thursday morning for guided tours

notes:
Housed in the former 18th-century Front Palace, this is the main branch of the national museums in Thailand. It offers a comprehensive overview of Thai history from Neolithic times through the various kingdoms. The Royal Funeral Chariots gallery is particularly impressive and unique.

---

name.local: อุทยาน ๑๐๐ ปี จุฬาลงกรณ์มหาวิทยาลัย
name.zh: 朱拉隆功大学百年纪念公园

location.address: 254 Phayathai Rd, Wang Mai, Pathum Wan, Bangkok 10330, Thailand

experience.summary: 朱拉隆功大学百年纪念公园，市中心绿色秘境
highlights: Near famous street food areas (Ban That Thong)

practical.transport: MRT: 10-12 min walk from MRT Sam Yan Station; Bus: Multiple routes along Rama IV or Phaya Thai Road; Parking: Available at I'm Park or adjacent lots

recommendation.bestTime: Late afternoon (4 PM - 6 PM) for sunset and exercise

notes:
A hidden green gem in central Bangkok designed to manage water and reduce the "urban heat island" effect. It is a beautiful example of modern landscape architecture and a popular spot for photography, picnicking, and watching the sunset among the city skyscrapers.

---

location.address: Therd Thai Road, Talat Phlu, Thon Buri, Bangkok 10600, Thailand

experience.summary: 哒叻蒲老街，曼谷最古老的美食街区之一
highlights: Wide variety of traditional Thai desserts

practical.transport: BTS: 10 min walk from BTS Talat Phlu; MRT: Near MRT Tha Phra; Train: Maeklong Railway line (Wongwian Yai – Mahachai)

notes:
Talat Phlu is one of Bangkok’s oldest and most famous food neighborhoods. It was historically a hub for betel nut trading (hence the name). Today, it is a pilgrimage site for street food enthusiasts. The area retains a nostalgic charm with its old wooden buildings and the active railway line passing through the heart of the market.

---

name.local: อินดอร์ สเตเดียม หัวหมาก

location.address: 286 Ramkhamhaeng Rd, Hua Mak, Bang Kapi, Bangkok 10240, Thailand

experience.summary: 华马克室内体育馆，国际赛事与演唱会场地
highlights: Part of the Rajamangala National Stadium complex
Host venue for the 2025 FIVB Volleyball Women's World Championship
Major venue for concerts and international indoor sports

practical.transport: MRT: Yellow Line (Lamsali Station + Taxi); Boat: Ramkhamhaeng Pier (Canal Boat)

notes:
This stadium is a core part of Thailand's sports history. It is frequently used for international volleyball matches, which are extremely popular in Thailand. In 2025, it will be a primary venue for the Women's Volleyball World Championship. The stadium is located within the Sports Authority of Thailand (SAT) complex, which also includes the national football stadium.

---

name.local: สวนเสรีไทย

location.address: Seri Thai Road, Khlong Kum, Bueng Kum, Bangkok 10240, Thailand

experience.summary: 自由泰公园，有湖景花园和二战博物馆
highlights: Large beautiful lake and water gardens
Seri Thai (Free Thai Movement) Memorial Museum
Peaceful and less touristy than city center parks
Exercise tracks and public swimming pool

practical.transport: Taxi: Best way to reach from Bang Kapi or Lat Phrao; Bus: Multiple routes along Seri Thai Road

notes:
Formerly known as Bueng Kum Water Park, it was renamed to honor the Seri Thai (Free Thai Movement) that resisted Japanese occupation during WWII. It features a large reservoir and the Seri Thai Memorial Library and Museum. It is a very peaceful, lush green space primarily used by locals for recreation and fitness.

---

name.local: สวนหลวง ร.9

location.address: Chaloem Phrakiat Ratchakan Thi 9 Rd, Nong Bon, Prawet, Bangkok 10250, Thailand

experience.summary: 九世王御苑，曼谷最大的植物园和公园
highlights: Large lake with swan paddle boats

practical.transport: MRT: 15 min walk from MRT Yellow Line (Suan Luang Rama 9)

recommendation.bestTime: December for the flower festival; or late afternoon
nearby: MRT Yellow Line (Suan Luang Rama 9 Station)

notes:
Built in 1987 to commemorate King Rama IX’s 60th birthday, this is Bangkok’s largest botanical garden and public park. It is famous for its stunning architecture, diverse plant collections, and the large central lake. It offers a much more tranquil and "nature-focused" experience compared to Lumphini Park.

---
